span.p:
Instances
Functions, Tables, Memories,
Globals, Data, Aggregates

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Instruction Core
- Parametric (drop, select)
- Control (block, loop, br)
- Variables (local.get/set)
- Memory (i32.load/store)
- References (ref.null, ref.func)
- Aggregates (struct.new, array.get)
